allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "sc query type= service state= all")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d postgres -c "SELECT version\(\);")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d postgres -c "ALTER USER postgres WITH PASSWORD 'admin';")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE keystrokes_db;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d keystrokes_db -c "\\d users_vectors")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d keystrokes_db -c "SELECT id, username, model_type, round\(threshold::numeric,4\) as threshold, n_genuine, n_impostor, n_samples_total FROM user_ml_models;")
